choice.title: Uhh, hey, uhm, sorry.
choice.response: You ruined my afternoon swim!

choice.title: Uhh, yeah, who are you?
choice.response: I'm Tinderella.

choice.title: And?
choice.response: I'm here to finish the project.

choice.title: What project?
choice.response: This little hideout of yours.

choice.title: Ohh, you're Tinker's son?
choice.response: Are you stupid?

choice.title: Uhh?
choice.response: I'm Tinker's daughter!

choice.title: Ohh, how was I supposed to know that?
choice.response: You see these spikes on my back?

choice.title: Uhh, yes.
choice.response: With my species that means I'm a girl.

choice.title: I'm not a biologist.
choice.response: I'm not a biologist either but...

choice.title: But?
choice.response: If one of your species has muscles and...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And clearly visible dangly bits...

choice.title: Uhuh?
choice.response: You may want to call that boy...

choice.title: What?
choice.response: Michael instead of Michelle.

choice.title: All righty then.
choice.response: Now, about the project...

choice.title: Uhuh.
choice.response: Building code 13 F.U. requires some changes.

choice.title: What does F.U. stand for?
choice.response: Functional utilities.

choice.title: Ok, and that means?
choice.response: It means your guests can't sleep on the floor...

choice.title: And?
choice.response: And your utility rooms must be organized.

choice.title: Ok, and that means more tasks?
choice.response: Yes, would you like to see them now?

choices.title: Are you here for more tasks?

choice.title: STR_NO
choice.response: See you later then.
